top3.sql:
SELECT code, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nationality = 'Dutch') AS dutch_count
FROM (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
GROUP BY code;

SELECT code
FROM drivers
ORDER BY dob DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH youngest_drivers AS (
    SELECT driverId, code, dob
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(code, ', ') FROM youngest_drivers) AS code_numbers,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM youngest_drivers yd JOIN drivers d ON yd.driverId = d.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'Dutch') AS dutch_drivers_count;

SELECT code, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nationality = 'Dutch') AS dutch_count
FROM (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
GROUP BY code;

SELECT code
FROM drivers
ORDER BY dob DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH youngest_drivers AS (
    SELECT driverId, code, dob
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(code, ', ') FROM youngest_drivers) AS code_numbers,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM youngest_drivers yd JOIN drivers d ON yd.driverId = d.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'Dutch') AS dutch_drivers_count;

SELECT code, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nationality = 'Dutch') AS dutch_count
FROM (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
GROUP BY code;

WITH youngest_drivers AS (
    SELECT driverId, code, dob, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code, ', ') AS code_numbers,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 END) AS dutch_drivers_count
FROM youngest_drivers;

final.sql:
WITH youngest_drivers AS (
    SELECT driverId, code, dob
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(code, ', ') FROM youngest_drivers) AS code_numbers,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM youngest_drivers yd JOIN drivers d ON yd.driverId = d.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'Dutch') AS dutch_drivers_count;
